description: Specially engineered to offer maximum performance and exemplary comfort, this pair of socks from fila are a great buy for those who never compromise on style and luxury. Made of soft cotton for a snug and secure Fit, durability and stretchable comfort Terry base foot-bed with power cushioning to absorb shock and impact, offering non-stop comfort Cushioned heel for impact protection Comfort grip at the mouth to ensure a soft grip around the ankle Soft seam at the toe region for abrasion-free comfort Brand name knitted at the mouth with red and white and blue tipping Sock care Machine wash in warm water using a mild detergent Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low in a delicate cycle Do not iron
